prestazioni: 13B-REW (T-II) twin-rotor engine: Full port-and-polish by Mazdaspeed with 1.5mm apex seal upgrade (carbon-infused), paired with a Garrett GT35R turbo (82mm compressor, .82 A/R turbine housing) and custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe by Racing Beat with 4-inch flex section and 304-grade merge collector

Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with custom 13B-REW fuel and ignition maps (E85-compatible), featuring dual AEM 380LPH fuel pumps, ID1000x injectors, and a custom-machined aluminum intake manifold by Rotary Aviation with velocity stacks and 80mm throttle body

Full drivetrain reinforcement: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2.5-way), PPG 2.1L steel billet flywheel, Spec Stage 4+ twin-disc clutch (ceramic-metallic), and Mazdaspeed 5-speed close-ratio gearset (2.75:1 1st gear) with upgraded synchros and carbon fiber shift fork
estetica: Veilside Fortune 99 widebody conversion (FC-specific, 3-piece FRP overfenders with 100mm rear stretch), paired with a custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap and JDM-spec Mazda Racing stripe kit (red/black, original FC3S Turbo II livery)

Rocket Bunny V2 aero kit (FC-specific, carbon fiber front bumper with integrated 3D splitter, side skirts with air curtains, and duckbill rear wing with adjustable Gurney flap), finished in raw carbon fiber with clear coat

Work Meister S1 3P wheels (16x9.5 +15 front, 16x10.5 +20 rear) with Toyo R888R tires (245/45/16 front, 275/40/16 rear), paired with BC Racing BR coilovers (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear) and Cusco front strut bar (22mm hollow aluminum)
